title: Treasure Cave
description: A polished action-exploration game with four difficulty-scaled levels. Navigate caverns, collect treasures, and defeat enemies and hazards. Features enhanced audio effects, particle systems, animated UI, and a challenging boss encounter on level 4. Includes screen shake, color palette effects, and dynamic difficulty scaling.
features: 10 distinct sound effects (menu, selection, hit, treasure collection, boss charge, boss hit, victory fanfare, game over)
Particle effects system with treasure sparkles and hit effects
Screen shake with intensity variation (enemy hits, boss hits, treasure collection)
Animated UI elements (pulsing health bar, treasure counter, lives indicator)
Palette color swaps for boss phases based on health
Boss encounter on level 4 with charge AI and health phases
Difficulty selection (easy, normal, hard) with scaled enemies, hazards, and treasures
Enhanced sprite designs with color variations
Flash overlay effects for treasure and damage feedback
Level complete celebration screen with animations
Hazard visual feedback with pulsing animation
